Documentation

Everything you need to go from keyword to ranking website.

Getting Started

  1. Create a free account — no credit card required
  2. Create your first project — enter a keyword or niche
  3. Run a competitor analysis — see who ranks and why
  4. Generate your SEO strategy — topic clusters, content calendar, keyword priorities
  5. Build and deploy your site

How It Works

1. Competitor Intelligence

Enter a keyword. Our engine searches across multiple engines to find the top-ranking competitors in your niche. It crawls their websites, analyzes their SEO signals — title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, schema markup, content depth, internal linking — and generates a SWOT report showing exactly where you can beat them.

2. SEO Strategy

Real search volume data powers your strategy. See actual monthly searches, keyword difficulty scores, CPC values, and search intent for every keyword. Get a 6-month content calendar with pillar pages, cluster topics, and priority rankings — so you know exactly what to build first.

3. Content Generation

AI writes SEO-optimized articles tailored to your keywords. Each article targets specific search intent, includes proper heading hierarchy, and passes through our humanizer to read naturally. Starter plan includes 15 articles/month, Pro includes 100.

4. Programmatic SEO

Scale from 1 page to thousands. Upload a dataset (cities, products, categories) and our template engine generates unique, SEO-optimized pages for every row — with automatic internal linking and content variation to avoid duplicate content penalties.

5. Deployment

One-click deploy to your own server, or use our recommended hosting partners. Your site is standard code — you own it, you can export it, no lock-in.

Pricing & Credits

Every operation costs credits. Free accounts get 50 one-time credits — enough for 1 competitor analysis and 1 full SEO strategy plan. Paid plans include monthly credit refreshes.

OperationCredits
Competitor Analysis5
SEO Strategy Plan10
Site Generation20
AI Article (500 words)3
AI Pillar Page (2000 words)10
Programmatic Page1
Deployment5
Rank Check (per keyword)1

See pricing for plan details and credit limits.

SEO Best Practices

Keyword Research

Start with long-tail keywords (3-5 words). They have lower competition and higher conversion intent. Use the competitor analysis to find gaps your competitors are missing.

Content Structure

Every page should have: one H1, clear H2/H3 hierarchy, short paragraphs (2-4 sentences), bullet points for scannability, and an FAQ section. Our generator handles this automatically.

Internal Linking

Link related pages together. City pages should link to other city pages in the same country. Product pages should link to comparison pages. Our programmatic engine builds these links automatically.

Monitoring

SEO is not set-and-forget. Track your rankings, watch for content decay, and refresh underperforming pages. Pro plan includes automated rank monitoring and decay detection.

FAQ

Can I export my site?

Yes. Generated sites are standard projects. Export the code and deploy anywhere — your own server, any cloud platform. No proprietary format.

Do I need my own server?

No. We can deploy to recommended hosting partners. If you prefer your own server, we support that too.

What's the difference from other SEO tools?

Other tools do one thing: analyze, write content, or build sites. We do all three in one pipeline — from keyword research to deployed website.

Is my data shared with AI models?

No. Your SEO data and content are private. We do not use your data to train models.
